Job description

**Dental Experience is Mandatory**

Are you looking for your next career endeavour? How would you like to be part of a patient-centric practice that TRULY appreciates the team and giving back to the community.

Vision Statement: Passionate People. Exceptional Experiences. Generous Giving.

Core Values: Ethical. Hardworking. Accountable. Professional. Positive. Adaptable. Proactive. Engaged.

At Villanova Dental Studio, we’re a team of passionate professionals looking to have a meaningful impact on our community by providing the best in cutting edge dental care. We provide general dentistry and a wide variety of specialty dentistry including ortho, perio, implants, endodontics, cosmetics, sleep appliances, neuromuscular/TMJ, and more.

Villanova Dental Studio strives to deliver exceptional modern dental care for all generations. We are looking for people who are passionate about providing quality care and service, and establishing long lasting client relationships based on trust and comfort.

We are known for ensuring our team members enjoy the following conveniences:

Health & Life Benefits
Monthly Incentives & Competitive Wages
Paid Time Off & Training
Continuing Educ
